snippet.title: Hurricane - LOCO LOCO - Serbia 🇷🇸  - Official Music Video - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Hurricane will represent Serbia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song LOCO LOCO.
-
Composer: Nemanja Antonić
Lyrics: Sanja Vučić
Arrangement: Nemanja Antonić, Darko Dimitrov
-
Lyrics:
Nemoj da se ljutiš, hrabrost skupi
Jedna cura kao ja ne traži obećanja
Ne skidaš taj pogled ti sa mene
Lako ušla sam ja u tvoje vene

Osmeh tvoj mi kaže
Da me želiš koga lažeš
Slatka kao ćoko moko
Hajde budi loco

Ram ba-ba-bam
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biže lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

Baby, baby, baby, čemu drama
Jedna cura kao ja ne traži obećanja
Baby, baby, baby, igram sama
To što nisi sa mnom to je tvoja mana

Osmeh tvoj mi kaže
Da me želiš koga lažeš
Slatka kao čoko moko
Hajde budi loco

1, 2... Girls, Come on!
Loco loco
Loco loco
Loco loco

Ne skidaš pogled sa mene
Lako sam ti ušla u vene
Hajde budi loco loco

A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biće lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biće lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

Shop the official Eurovision Song Contest merchandise: https://shop.eurovision.tv/
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eurovision 
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/Eurovision
Follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EurovisionSongContest/

Lyrics: Jovana Radosavljević


#FOBIJE

Ide priča da u oku mom đavo stanuje
Noć je gore
Jutra hladna k’o led

Da se svima
Pakao samo raduje
Jer tu ljubav ne stiže na red

A ti znaš, zar ne?!
Nisam kriva ja
Posle tebe bol me je
Loše skrojila

Nema sad šanse da opet volim
Pancir sa ovog srca da sklonim
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije

Pored mene
Samo ranjene duše padaju
K’o da sada
Samo radim na zlo
Baš od one,
One što za ljubav bi dala sve
Jedan posto
Nije ostalo

A ti znaš, zar ne?!
Nisam kriva ja
Posle tebe bol me je
Loše skrojila

Nema sad šanse da opet volim
Pancir sa ovog srca da sklonim
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije

Samo samo dah... U samoći
Samo samo

U samoći

Ove noći

Daj dodaj mi tog vina vina

Ti zavodi me 
Ma samo nek te ima, ima
Još dolivam benzina
Nek izgori sve

snippet.title: DOBRO JUTRO KOMŠIJA (SEZONA 3) - EPIZODA 1
snippet.description:
"Dobro Jutro, Komšija" vam predstavlja novu sezonu najgledanije serije. Nakon sedam dijelova filma i dvije sezone serije tu je nova sezona serije koji će vas nasmijati do suza, kao i svi prethodni dijelovi do sad.

Pretplatite/subscribe se na naš YouTube kanal: https://bit.ly/2MWNu3v

Sve epizode druge sezone serije: https://bit.ly/35OCz2y
Sve epizode treće sezone serije: https://bit.ly/3t1AKv1
Pogledajte sve dijelove naših filmova: https://bit.ly/36suGkm

Najbolje scene iz serije (druga sezona): https://bit.ly/3qwLrp0

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Sa tobom sve je rulet, od milke do nule,
Brze nego Tesla S, ej
Tako ti je sa princezama, voli kad je vezana,
Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ele ele ele ele
Ko bi reko da je mala ziva vatra.
Ele ele
Njene misli koje skriva nocu gresnije od pakla.

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Mala moze casove da daje,
Kada igra opasna je,
I svi kazu aj jaj jaj jaj,

Nocas lepa je ko Raj,
Kukovima uvija,
I svi kazu samo aj jaj jaj

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry’s Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines won’t be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

Subscribe to The National: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

Connect with The National online:
Facebook | https://www.facebook.com/thenational
Twitter | https://twitter.com/CBCTheNational
Instagram | https://www.instagram.com/cbcthenational

More from CBC News | https://www.cbc.ca/news

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

snippet.description:

Music: Bojan Vasić
Lyrics: Aleksandar Tomić-Tomica, Edita Aradinović
Arrangement: Bojan Vasić
Backing vocals: Edita Aradinović
Trumpet: Miloš Nikolić
Piano: Bojan Vasić
Violin: Ema Lukić
Guitar: Saša Sedlar
Bass: Miroslav Tovirac
Drums: Vladimir Ružičić
Mix: Jan Magdevski
Master: Jan Magdevski

🎵 Stream:
Deezer: http://bit.ly/2Zw8yUw
Spotify: http://spoti.fi/3pHmo0W
Apple: http://apple.co/2NqaWtp

Directed by: Nemanja Novaković
DoP: Lazar Bogdanović
Producer: Aleksandar Pejčić
Video Production: NN-media +38162357368

Editing: Nemanja Novaković/Aleksandar Kasalica
Color Correction: Nikola Marinković
Camera: Artcorestudio
Lighting: Sapa Light

Actor: Nikola 

Makeup: Ena Jović
Costume: Dijana Malnar
Hair: Jovana Jeremić



LYRICS:
Svaki sat, svaki sprat ja sam brojala,
Noćima ispred tvojih vrata plakala.
I kad ljubav u tebi ne osećam,
Ne dam ja na tebe - MOJE.

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Moj si lom, moj si slom, moj si brodolom,
Ja u tebi sve sam našla.

Moj si, moj savršen greh, neću, ne želim da stanem,
Ja bih da zagrlim te, a ti bi da odeš odavde.
Moj si, moj melek, moj bol!
Kako da pomerim s’ tobom kraj?
U oči dok gledam te sad, k’o dete u porušen grad...

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Boli kad zaplače u meni ta devojčica, što voli te, voli te, voli te...

Copying, re-uploading and illegally distributing this copyrighted work is strictly prohibited! ©

Moj si, moj melek, moj bol!
Kako da pomerim s’ tobom kraj?
U oči dok gledam te sad, k’o dete u porušen grad...

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Boli kad zaplače u meni ta devojčica, što voli te, voli te, voli te...

Copying, re-uploading and illegally distributing this copyrighted work is strictly prohibited! ©

snippet.title: BEZ USTRUČAVANJA - Božo Prelević: U toku je obračun između Aleksandra Vučića i Nebojše Stefanovića!
snippet.description:
Gost emisije “Bez ustručavanja” bio je advokat i nekadašnji ministar MUP-a, Božo Prelević koji je komentarisao hapšenje kriminalne grupe Veljka Belivuka i ukazao na događaje prethodinih godina koji su ovu grupu povezivali sa aktuelnom vlašću. Da li je poređenje ovog klana sa Zemunskim opravdano i zbog čega se toliko dugo čekalo na njihovo hapšenje, šta nam govori vreme njihovog lišavanja slobode, zbog čega su snimci sa mesta zločina procureli u javnost i objavljivani u tabloidima i na televizijama, po rečima Bože Prelevića, to govori o uništavanju i kriminalizovanju institucija. Kako komentariše ostavke sekretara Državnog veća tužilaca Tome Zorića, ali i Vladimira Vuletića sa mesta potpredsednika FK ”Partzian”, ali i saslušanje nekadašnjeg načelnika Kriminalističke policije Ilije Milačića, saznaćete u emisiji. Prelević je komentarisao i izbor Jasmine Vasović za predsednicu Vrhovnog Kasacionog suda, ali i Zoru Dobričanin za članicu Visokog saveta sudstva i Državnog veća tužilaca i podsetio da je ona branilac okrivljenih u aferi “Jovanjica”. Prelević smatra da će zbog kriminalnih klanova reagovati i Evropa, jer prevazilaze okvire naše zemlje, u emisiji ćete takođe moći da saznate zbog čega smatra da nam je Francuska podrška ka Evropskoj Uniji, ali i zbog čega je skeptik kada se govori o ubrzanom procesu ka priključivanju i otvaranju novih klastera. Hoće li se opozicija ujediniti, šta očekuje od pregovora između vlasti i opozicije, zbog čega je pomoć iz Evrope u pregovaranju neophodna i koja je uloga Skupštine slobodne Srbije, vidi li šansu opozicije na narednim izborima, samo su neka od pitanja o aktuelnim političkim temama na koje je dao odgovor. Gost je čestitao predsedniku Srbije Aleksandru Vučiću na vakcinaciji stanovništva, ali i izrazio zabrinutost zbog izuzetka empatije kod naših građana zbog broja preminulih lekara usled pandemije i sa druge strane, kako kaže već skoro godinu dana neometanog organizovanja kovid zabava.

Follow us:

https://www.instagram.com/ktvbezcenzu...​
https://www.facebook.com/BezUstrucava...​
https://www.facebook.com/KTVBezCenzur...​

snippet.title: IK1 Sta sam tebi & ko sam sebi | Andjelka Prpic
snippet.description:
Jedna od nasih najpopularnijih glumica, Andjelka Prpic na stolici preko puta Ivana Stankovica.

Dobrodošli na zvanični YouTube kanal K1 TV-a!
↓ ↓ ↓ Posetite naš sajt i naloge na društvenim mrežama:
K1TV WEB: https://bit.ly/K1TVsajt
K1TV Program: https://bit.ly/K1TVprogram
✔ FACEBOOK: https://bit.ly/K1TVFacebook 
📷 INSTAGRAM: https://bit.ly/K1TVInstagram
❥ YOUTUBE: https://bit.ly/K1TVYouTube

Razonodite se uz muzičko-zabavni sadržaj domaće produkcije najvišeg standarda, kao i premijerno prikazivanje najpopularnijih stranih TV formata.
Iz naše produkcije izdvajamo sledeće emisije:

"JOJO"
Dve devojke iz grada koje su navikle na modu, izlaske, moderne tehnologije i glamur pokušavaju da upoznaju manje urbane delove Srbije i da ih zavole.
Uskoro:

"Šta sam sebi, ko sam tebi"
Voditelj, Ivan Stanković, marketing guru, vodi intervju sa popularnim autorima u studiju, pred publikom. Gost “jedan na jedan” razgovara sa voditeljem o svemu, “na iglama” zbog voditelja i prisutne publike.
LINK: https://bit.ly/StaSamSebiIkoSamSebi

"Top Lista"
Drugačija od drugih, Iva, vodi vas u svet aktuelne svetske i domaće muzičke scene. Saznaćete šta drugi slušaju, ko je i zbog čega na vrhu top lista. Uz to, otkrićete
zanimljive detalje iz privatnog života izvođača sa top liste.

"Generalka"
Koje javne ličnosti su radile intervencije na licu i telu? Kako su izgledale pre, a kako posle njih i da li one to kriju ili otvoreno o tome pričaju? Kroz ove zanimljive razgovore vode vas Milica Lešić i Ljubomir Dorontić.
LINK: https://bit.ly/K1Generalka

"Dnevna Doza Popa"
Glumačko-voditeljski par Nataša Aksentijević i Predrag Peđa Damnjanović vas uvode u svet pop kulture. Sa gostima pričaju o zabavnim sadržajima, umetnosti i aktuelnim dešavanjima u svetu i kod nas. Uz pomoć benda i kroz zabavne igre zajedno sa gostima se zabavljaju na dinamičan i upečatljiv način.
LINK: https://bit.ly/DnevnaDozaPopa

"Kec na Jedanaest"
Ponovo su tu! Omiljeni voditeljski par, Boško Jakovljević i Aleksandra Jeftanović, vode vas kroz kasni jutarnji šou, svakog radnog dana od 11 do 13.
LINK: https://bit.ly/KecNaJedanaest

Pratite nas na MTS-u, Supernovi i Orionu.

#K1

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

Dve devojke iz grada koje su navikle na modu, izlaske, moderne tehnologije i glamur pokušavaju da upoznaju manje urbane delove Srbije i da ih zavole.
Uskoro:

"Šta sam sebi, ko sam tebi"
Voditelj, Ivan Stanković, marketing guru, vodi intervju sa popularnim autorima u studiju, pred publikom. Gost “jedan na jedan” razgovara sa voditeljem o svemu, “na iglama” zbog voditelja i prisutne publike.
LINK: https://bit.ly/StaSamSebiIkoSamSebi

"Top Lista"
Drugačija od drugih, Iva, vodi vas u svet aktuelne svetske i domaće muzičke scene. Saznaćete šta drugi slušaju, ko je i zbog čega na vrhu top lista. Uz to, otkrićete
zanimljive detalje iz privatnog života izvođača sa top liste.

"Generalka"
Koje javne ličnosti su radile intervencije na licu i telu? Kako su izgledale pre, a kako posle njih i da li one to kriju ili otvoreno o tome pričaju? Kroz ove zanimljive razgovore vode vas Milica Lešić i Ljubomir Dorontić.
LINK: https://bit.ly/K1Generalka

"Dnevna Doza Popa"
Glumačko-voditeljski par Nataša Aksentijević i Predrag Peđa Damnjanović vas uvode u svet pop kulture. Sa gostima pričaju o zabavnim sadržajima, umetnosti i aktuelnim dešavanjima u svetu i kod nas. Uz pomoć benda i kroz zabavne igre zajedno sa gostima se zabavljaju na dinamičan i upečatljiv način.
LINK: https://bit.ly/DnevnaDozaPopa

"Kec na Jedanaest"
Ponovo su tu! Omiljeni voditeljski par, Boško Jakovljević i Aleksandra Jeftanović, vode vas kroz kasni jutarnji šou, svakog radnog dana od 11 do 13.
LINK: https://bit.ly/KecNaJedanaest

Pratite nas na MTS-u, Supernovi i Orionu.

#K1

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

snippet.title: Na večeri kod: Tijana Dapčević / sezona 2 / ep2
snippet.description:
U sledećoj epizodi serijala "Na večeri kod" videćete kako se u ulozi domaćice snašla prva predstavnica Biber ekipe, šarmantna Tijana Dapčević.
Njene srpsko-makedonske specijalitete ocenjivaće Ana Stanić, Ivana Peters, Aleksandra Bursać, Milan Gromilić, Bojan Vasković i prošlonedeljni domaćin Ivan Mihailović.

Saznaćete za koju je pesmu Tijana dobila najveći bakšiš u životu i to baš od sopstvenog muža sa kojim je počela da živi dan-dva nakon upoznavanja. Čućete kako ona sama sebe zove i šta o tome misli njena najbolja drugarica i imenjakinja Tijana.
Tijana otkriva da njeno violončelo ima ime, ali i zašto nije postala pijanista ili violinista i zašto je "privilegija" kada ni jedan jedini dan ne mora da ide na posao.

Njeni gosti pokazali su se kao duhoviti, ješni i raspevani, a u tome su posebno prednjačili Ivana i Bojan koji je svojim saborcima otkrio i šta znači "kovrdžavo pevanje", ali je i sama domaćica u više navrata potvrdila svoj dobar glas.


Label and copyright: Radio-televizija Srbije
 
Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimaka i postavljanje na druge kanale!

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey.

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Instagram: https://bit.ly/1Q7NGnY
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: Najjednostavnija čokoladna torta sa piškotama - bez kuvanja i pečenja
snippet.description:
Čokoladna torta sa piškotama je za sve one koji vole mnogo bogatog krema. Iz naslova vidimo da je sa čokoladom, kao i da je priprema veoma jednostavna, tako da će se sigurno dopasti svima sa nedostatkom vremena. Tortu sa piškotama možete da pravite uz dodavanje nekih svojih omiljenih sastojaka jer je apsolutno podložna promenama. 

Pisani recept možete pronaći na https://domacirecepti.net/cokoladna-torta-sa-piskotama-video/

Domaći recepti je kanal na kojem prikazujemo video recepte za torte, kolače, pogače, kifle. Možete naći predjela kao i glavna jela. Pravimo još i sitne kolače, kolače za slavu, lepinje, posna jela, slavske pogače.

▶ Možete nas podržati i na ovaj način: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCziASxiSNISFR_FxJ8vFjnA/join

1 l slatke pavlake

snippet.title: URANAK1 | Zašto su Hrkalovićeva i Kokeza odbili detektor laži? | Božo Spasić | Milan Živadinović
snippet.description:
Dobrodošli na zvanični YouTube kanal K1 TV-a!
↓ ↓ ↓ Posetite naš sajt i naloge na društvenim mrežama:
K1TV WEB: https://bit.ly/K1TVsajt
K1TV Program: https://bit.ly/K1TVprogram
✔ FACEBOOK: https://bit.ly/K1TVFacebook 
📷 INSTAGRAM: https://bit.ly/K1TVInstagram
❥ YOUTUBE: https://bit.ly/K1TVYouTube

Razonodite se uz muzičko-zabavni sadržaj domaće produkcije najvišeg standarda, kao i premijerno prikazivanje najpopularnijih stranih TV formata.
Iz naše produkcije izdvajamo sledeće emisije:

"JOJO"
Dve devojke iz grada koje su navikle na modu, izlaske, moderne tehnologije i glamur pokušavaju da upoznaju manje urbane delove Srbije i da ih zavole.
Uskoro:

"Šta sam sebi, ko sam tebi"
Voditelj, Ivan Stanković, marketing guru, vodi intervju sa popularnim autorima u studiju, pred publikom. Gost “jedan na jedan” razgovara sa voditeljem o svemu, “na iglama” zbog voditelja i prisutne publike.
LINK: https://bit.ly/StaSamSebiIkoSamSebi

"Top Lista"
Drugačija od drugih, Iva, vodi vas u svet aktuelne svetske i domaće muzičke scene. Saznaćete šta drugi slušaju, ko je i zbog čega na vrhu top lista. Uz to, otkrićete
zanimljive detalje iz privatnog života izvođača sa top liste.

"Generalka"
Koje javne ličnosti su radile intervencije na licu i telu? Kako su izgledale pre, a kako posle njih i da li one to kriju ili otvoreno o tome pričaju? Kroz ove zanimljive razgovore vode vas Milica Lešić i Ljubomir Dorontić.
LINK: https://bit.ly/K1Generalka

"Dnevna Doza Popa"
Glumačko-voditeljski par Nataša Aksentijević i Predrag Peđa Damnjanović vas uvode u svet pop kulture. Sa gostima pričaju o zabavnim sadržajima, umetnosti i aktuelnim dešavanjima u svetu i kod nas. Uz pomoć benda i kroz zabavne igre zajedno sa gostima se zabavljaju na dinamičan i upečatljiv način.
LINK: https://bit.ly/DnevnaDozaPopa

"Kec na Jedanaest"
Ponovo su tu! Omiljeni voditeljski par, Boško Jakovljević i Aleksandra Jeftanović, vode vas kroz kasni jutarnji šou, svakog radnog dana od 11 do 13.
LINK: https://bit.ly/KecNaJedanaest

Pratite nas na MTS-u, Supernovi i Orionu.

#K1

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

snippet.title: Emanet 131. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 131 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#Shorts

localized.title: Emanet 131. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 131 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
localized.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#Shorts

snippet.title: MEDICO - Mamma Mia (prod. by EnelBeatz)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM PROFILI:
Medico : https://www.instagram.com/whoismedico/

Music: Medico
Text: Medico
Arrangement: EnelBeatz
Back vocal: Maša Sitarica
Mix & Master: Arpino Sachi


Video production: Vedad Mandra | xvedmanx
Directed by: Medico, Vedad Mandra
Script: Vedad Mandra, Medico
Camera: Vedad Mandra
CC VFX Post: Vedad Mandra
Costume: Emina Tsili

TEXT

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrti se sve dharma 
mama mia

ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x2


vers1
moje sve htjele bi bit
 jer na meni samo je lagerfeld karl e 
zelja joj htjela benz
 nije ni bitno ko sjedi sa strane

moli da voli brzo da boli
moli za gole sate
prolij pa dolij 
glumi mi dolly dobro ta zna sta radi

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugi il treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrati se sve dharma 
mama mia

 ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x3


vers 2.
da li mislis na mene ko prije
prisjetis se probije ko noz
navijas ti za mene i lijek
tvoj sam jedini ja antidot

znas ti moje namjere ne nisu namjerne
ali vuce me na zlo
velike su razmjere izmedju zavjere
razlika je nebo tlo

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugil treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal
takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

snippet.title: Meghan Markle Says Kate Middleton Made Her Cry Before Wedding
snippet.description:
Meghan Markle is setting the record straight. The former “Suits” star spoke with Oprah Winfrey during a bombshell tell-all on CBS, where she addressed a past rumor that she made Kate Middleton cry prior to her wedding to Prince Harry. She said the situation was actually the opposite, and that it was actually Kate who made her cry and that her sister-in-law ended up apologizing.

snippet.title: Vladika Porfirije pjeva četničke pjesme
snippet.description:
Novi patrijarh SPC-a Porfirije, do danas mitropolit zagrebačko-ljubljanski osvanuo je prije pet godina na video snimku, kako u zanimljivom društvu pjeva četničku pjesmu posvećenu četničkom vojvodi Momčilu Đujiću, ratnom zločincu iz Drugog svjetskog rata.

Snimak je navodno nastao prije pet godina u Chicagu.

- Nakon liturgije bio je ručak i zabava, rekao sam Voji Bilbiji da otpjeva "našu pjesmu", misleći na "Tamo daleko". On je počeo pjevati pjesmu koju i ne znam i nekako sam pjevušio za njima, malo iznenađen što nije zapjevao onu koju sam mislio, pa sam u jednom trenutku i zašutio - pravdao se Porfirije u hrvatskim medijima rekavši da je zašutio kada se pjevalo o "kokardi vojvode Đujića".

Iz snimke se jasno vidi da je Perić velik dio pjesme zaista opjevao, a već od početka same pjesme jasno je da se radi o pjesmi ratne tematike s obzirom da se spominju "mitraljesci" i "granate".

- Šta se ono na Dinari sjaji, Đujićeva kokarda na glavi - kaže sporni stih, a teško je procijeniti je li Porfirije zaista, kako tvrdi, prestao pjevati.

Pop Momčilo Đujić četnički je vojvoda i ratni zločinac odgovoran za neke od najgnusnijih zločina na ovim područjima u Drugom svjetskom ratu. Đujićevi četnici jedan od najvećih pokolja napravili su u selu Gata u zaleđu Omiša kada su 1.oktobra 1942. godine zvjerski poklali 95 civila.
tags: Šta se ono na Dinari sjaji
Serbian Orthodox priests singing a song of a Serbian fascist movement

snippet.title: Jokic STEALS The MVP Trophy From Giannis (What You DIDN'T SEE)
snippet.description:
Giannis won the All Star Game MVP by going 16 out of 16 from the field. And later in the postgame interview he celebrated like Lebron James. 
Let me show you a few more interesting moments from the All Star Game that you may have missed. What up everybody my name is Stefan and this is Heat Check. Let’s get into it.
After winning the 3 point shootout with the last shot, Steph Curry continued his lights out shooting in the actual game as well. And for those of you that missed it, Steph did his signature look away with the ball still in the air. A classic that never gets old.
And on the topic of shooting, of course you saw the wild half court barrage that him and Damian Lillard had. And Dame of course ended the game that way, with a shot from the logo.
The most interesting thing for me here is that Curry already knew what was about to happen as soon as Lillard got the ball. So he started waving goodbye announcing that the game is over.
And of course it was over at that same moment.
So after all those long range shots by Portland’s superstar, Paul George finally admitted in the postgame interview that the Blazers vs Thunder playoff three, is actually not a bad shot.
You all remember this right? Well here is PG admitting that he was wrong. BTW did you know that this is the first official basketball game that Steph and Lebron have been on the same team? They haven’t played together in the All Star Game before nor have they been on the same Team USA roster.
So it was great to see moments like these as we got a glimpse of what could have been if these 2 played together on the same roster. This is literally a cheat code.
The mutual respect and appreciation continued after the game on twitter as you can see with Lebron leading the way, and Curry responding.
My favorite thing from the entire  All Star is probably seeing how much fun Nikola Jokic had, and how much he enjoyed being out there.
Like look at him, he is acting crazy after the simplest bucket ever, then check out his reaction on the Giannis three. Hilarious.
And these 2 definitely had great chemistry, as we see Nikola teaching Giannis some dancing moves on the bench.
And at the end, Antetokounmpo borrowed the MVP trophy to Jokic, so that he can feel like he won it. Man this is too funny seeing that big of a dude acting with pure joy like a little kid.
In the postgame he joked about being snubbed from the All Star Game MVP for the second consecutive year. This dude is one of the funniest characters in the league.
To top things off, he wore a mismatch colored sneakers in the game, and for those of you that haven’t seen his logo, check it out, I think it's a pretty cool design. The Joker hat with the initials and the number. Good job Nike.
Did you see this? Jaylen Brown tried to pass it to himself and dunk it off the backboard.
This was paying homage to Tracy Mcgrady who famously did it first, and Brown even had the same shoes that T-Mac was rocking back then. So it was a shame that he wasn’t able to finish it properly.
And you all saw these back to back alley oops between Steph and CP3. They almost never dunk in-game, and that is especially true for Chris Paul. So with his first dunk of the season, he surpassed Blake Griffin, who hasn’t dunked in more than a year. Now that’s a mind blowing fact in itself. 
Speaking of Blake Griffin however, I know that he wasn’t in the game itself, but the news about his move to the Brooklyn Nets happened yesterday, so some of you may have missed it.
Yeah, as if they weren’t stacked enough, now Blake comes in as extra firepower and according to Woj, the Nets plan to utilize him as a small ball center with the second unit.
While talking about Brooklyn, here’s how his new teammate Kyrie Irving came to the game.
We’ve seen him arriving at games like this a few times already, so this is nothing new but just wanted to mention it as part of the things that you guys may have missed from the All Star.
And at the very end I do like to point out that even tho the dunk contest was a bit disappointing, we did see 1 dunk that we haven’t seen before.
And that was this slam from Obi Topin which in my opinion received a way lower score than it should have.
People who follow the league closely, probably saw Zach Lavine do this during a pre-game warm up, but technically this hasn’t been done in a dunk contest. 
And I also wanna comment on the winning dunk by Anfernee Simmons. Even tho the execution wasn’t the greatest, I love the idea, and this is something that Dwight Howard was practicing before one of his dunk contests a few years ago, but as you can see he also couldn’t do it although he was close as well, so he ended up not trying it in the actual contest.
So yeah, all in all it was fun to take a break from the grind of the season, and Lebron definitely did that as he played the least minutes out of any player in the game.

hr.title: Natjecanja Dima Vs Košarkaša | Koga će poljubiti Diana?
hr.description:
Strasti se ne smiruju u školi! Dima će se boriti za svoju ljubav i izazvati košarkaša na natjecanje! A tko pobijedi na natjecanju, dobit će nagradu! Poljubac od Diane! Tko će pobijediti na natjecanju? Koga će poljubiti Diana? Pogledajte ovo izdanje!
Pretplatite se na kanal! 👩‍👩‍👦‍👦
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJuIFPGd2r5UM2rD2LGgvFg?sub_confirmation=1
Ne zaboravite na zvono! 🔔🔔🔔
Hvala na vašim lajkovima! ❤️❤️❤️

snippet.title: Дан заљубљених у Дијаниној школи | Кога ће Диана одабрати?
snippet.description:
Дан заљубљених се одржава у школи, а сви дечаци и девојчице припремили су поклоне за своје сродне душе. Али осећања нису увек обострана, а неки имају и неколико обожавалаца. Кога ће Диана одабрати? Дима или кошаркаш? Погледајте у овој серији!
Још један видео:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2hsc80Z5lKw
Претплатите се на канал!👩‍👩‍👦‍👦 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJuIFPGd2r5UM2rD2LGgvFg?sub_confirmation=1
Не заборавите на звоно!🔔🔔🔔
Хвала на вашим свиђањима!❤️❤️❤️

snippet.title: JUTRO-Biljana Čekić:„Bilo je emotivno teških scena.Kad držim svog brata, govorim mu koliko ga volim“
snippet.description:
Subscribe here: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
JUTRO - Biljana Čekić: „Bilo je emotivno teških scena. Kad držim svog brata, govorim mu koliko ga volim“ | PRVA
See more videos: https://bit.ly/JUTRO

Mala Biljana koja je oduševila naciju uključila se preko skajpa. Rekla je da je prezadovoljna utiscima i reakcijama publike na film. Svi su zadovoljni, čestitaju, ponosni su, kazala je.
Govoreći o tome koliko joj je snimanje teško palo, Biljana je rekla da nije bilo naporno fizički nego da je bilo emotivno teških scena, a posebno je izdvojila one scene kada je trebalo da se rastane od malog brata.

snippet.title: Meghan Markle Reveals Kate Middleton Made Her CRY Ahead of Wedding
snippet.description:
Meghan Markle sets the record straight on rumors that she made Kate Middleton cry during Sunday’s ‘Oprah With Meghan and Harry: A CBS Primetime Special.’ The Duchess of Sussex says that it was actually the reverse and that Middleton apologized and sent her flowers. Markle also told Winfrey about why she didn’t feel protected by the royal institution.

Exclusives from #ETonline :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQwITQ__CeH2Y_7g2xeiNDa0vQsROQQgv

snippet.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle speak out
snippet.description:
In their first wide-ranging interview since leaving the royal family, Prince Harry and Meghan, Duchess of Sussex discuss that decision, plus bouts of depression, racism, family infighting and much more with Oprah Winfrey. Gayle King reports.

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.description:

Doris Crljen za Frizerski salon Ars
frizerskisalonars@gmail.com
https://instagram.com/frizerski.salon.ars

Kontakt: Doris +385 916198908 

Official shoes (Damir): dr Martens 

https://instagram.com/shoebedoshops

Producent projekta: Snježana  Jerković Radočaj, Aleksandra Milutinović, Tijana Bogićević
Partner projekta: Dr. Vivian’s estetics 
Web: https://drvivianestetics.com
FB: https://www.facebook.com/Dr.Vivian.Estetics/
IG: @dr.vivianestetics (https://www.instagram.com/dr.vivianestetics/) 

Hvala:
Konjičkom klubu Njivice. Laura Kolić i Peter Požar hvala na stpljenju i obuci. Bila nam je čast imati u spotu vaše plemenite životinje.  
Konji: Dona Hamdani 118 i Caliopa.
Vlasnica Caliope: Mia Kulić
Doktorici Vivian Jurković na poverenju, savetima i saradnji. 
Muzeju grada Rijeke i Palači šećerane na predivnoj lokaciji za snimanje.

Hvala Mauro Širol i Croatia Records  na  tonskom snimanju. 


Connect with TIJANA BOGICEVIC on:
Facebook: http://fb.me/tijanabogicevicmusic
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/tijanabogicevic_music/
Twitter: http://twitter.com/tijanab_music

Connect with DAMIR KEDZO on:
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/kedzo.official
Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/damirkedzo 
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/DamirKedzo

Management & booking Damir Kedžo: 
Snježana Jerković Radočaj
snjezana@jrprodukcija.hr 
+385 98 1331122


TEKST “ HRAM”

Ostavio sam svoje dane u noći, 
Pa na sebe još sam ljut; 
I pogledam u mrak, ko u tvoje oči, 
U taj praznik prekinut.. 
Još me hrani nada da me pamtiš, 
Da sam ti sve, 
Ljubav nije uzmeš pa je vratiš 
Boli me... 

Tvoja ljubav je hram ljubavi 
I kad lomi se nebo ti zlato i srebro si, 
Hram ljubavi, 
Pobeda nam je predaja, zauvek duše su nam ogledala 
Ne veruj ni reč samo srca znaju 
Kad od želje gube dah; 
Ova ljubav je počela na kraju, 
Al imam snage za taj strah..

snippet.title: Emanet 132. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 132 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Masumiyet 2. Bölüm
snippet.description:
Masumiyet 2. Bölüm Tek Parça (3 Mart 2021)

Masumiyet Çarşamba 20.00'de FOX'ta!

İlker Ilgaz’ın kendi düğününde gözaltına alınmasıyla başlayan yeni süreç, yasak aşkın üzerindeki sır perdesini aralar. Üstü kapatılmış gerçekler ve görmezden gelinen yalanlar yavaş yavaş ortaya çıkarken, Bahar ve Hale çocukları uğruna karşı karşıya gelir. ‘Benim oğlum yapmaz’ sözünden dönmeyen Hale, İlker’in imajını kurtarmak için harekete geçer ve İrem’le, İlker’in cezaevinde evlenmelerine ön ayak olur. Kızının gizlice evlenmesiyle deliye dönen Harun ise çoktan tarafını seçmiştir. İrem, babasının tüm çabasına rağmen, tamamen kayınvalidesinin kontrolüne geçer. Bahar, kızının yoğun bakımdan çıkmasını adalete sığınarak beklerken, Ilgaz’lar sayesinde sınırsız gücün nasıl bir şey olduğu gerçeğiyle de tanışmak üzeredir. Ela’nın gözünü açmasıyla nefesler tutulur ve dava süreci başlar. İlker’in savunma stratejisi ise son derece acımasızdır.

Evli ve iki çocuk annesi Bahar’ın (Deniz Çakır) hayatı, 19 yaşındaki kızının yanlış bir adama aşık olmasıyla değişir. Kızı Ela’nın (İlayda Alişan) ilk aşkı, yaşıtı bir üniversite öğrencisi değil babasının, başkasıyla evlenmek üzere olan 35 yaşındaki patronudur. Kızını bu yanlış ilişkiden kurtarmaya çalışan Bahar, ne yapsa da olacakların önüne geçemez. Bahar ve ailesinin hayatı, Ela’nın 19. yaş gününde sonsuza kadar değişir.


OYUNCULAR: HÜLYA AVŞAR, MEHMET ASLANTUĞ, DENİZ ÇAKIR, İLAYDA ALİŞAN, SERKAY TÜTÜNCÜ, DENİZ IŞIN, SELEN UÇER, TOLGA GÜLEÇ, NESLİHAN ARSLAN, ASENA TUĞAL, ERTUĞRUL POSTOĞLU, ALAYÇA ÖZTÜRK GİDİŞLİ, KİMYA GÖKÇE AYTAÇ, GİZEM ERGÜN, ASENA KESKİNCİ, OZAN KAYA OKTU, SEVGİ TEMEL, RÜÇHAN ÇALIŞKUR

FOX Resmi Web Sitesi: https://www.fox.com.tr
Masumiyet: https://www.fox.com.tr/Masumiyet/izle
Resmi Facebook Sayfası: https://www.facebook.com/masumiyetfox/

#Masumiyet #FOX #FOXplay

tr.description:
Masumiyet 2. Bölüm Tek Parça (3 Mart 2021)

Masumiyet Çarşamba 20.00'de FOX'ta!

İlker Ilgaz’ın kendi düğününde gözaltına alınmasıyla başlayan yeni süreç, yasak aşkın üzerindeki sır perdesini aralar. Üstü kapatılmış gerçekler ve görmezden gelinen yalanlar yavaş yavaş ortaya çıkarken, Bahar ve Hale çocukları uğruna karşı karşıya gelir. ‘Benim oğlum yapmaz’ sözünden dönmeyen Hale, İlker’in imajını kurtarmak için harekete geçer ve İrem’le, İlker’in cezaevinde evlenmelerine ön ayak olur. Kızının gizlice evlenmesiyle deliye dönen Harun ise çoktan tarafını seçmiştir. İrem, babasının tüm çabasına rağmen, tamamen kayınvalidesinin kontrolüne geçer. Bahar, kızının yoğun bakımdan çıkmasını adalete sığınarak beklerken, Ilgaz’lar sayesinde sınırsız gücün nasıl bir şey olduğu gerçeğiyle de tanışmak üzeredir. Ela’nın gözünü açmasıyla nefesler tutulur ve dava süreci başlar. İlker’in savunma stratejisi ise son derece acımasızdır.

Evli ve iki çocuk annesi Bahar’ın (Deniz Çakır) hayatı, 19 yaşındaki kızının yanlış bir adama aşık olmasıyla değişir. Kızı Ela’nın (İlayda Alişan) ilk aşkı, yaşıtı bir üniversite öğrencisi değil babasının, başkasıyla evlenmek üzere olan 35 yaşındaki patronudur. Kızını bu yanlış ilişkiden kurtarmaya çalışan Bahar, ne yapsa da olacakların önüne geçemez. Bahar ve ailesinin hayatı, Ela’nın 19. yaş gününde sonsuza kadar değişir.


OYUNCULAR: HÜLYA AVŞAR, MEHMET ASLANTUĞ, DENİZ ÇAKIR, İLAYDA ALİŞAN, SERKAY TÜTÜNCÜ, DENİZ IŞIN, SELEN UÇER, TOLGA GÜLEÇ, NESLİHAN ARSLAN, ASENA TUĞAL, ERTUĞRUL POSTOĞLU, ALAYÇA ÖZTÜRK GİDİŞLİ, KİMYA GÖKÇE AYTAÇ, GİZEM ERGÜN, ASENA KESKİNCİ, OZAN KAYA OKTU, SEVGİ TEMEL, RÜÇHAN ÇALIŞKUR

FOX Resmi Web Sitesi: https://www.fox.com.tr
Masumiyet: https://www.fox.com.tr/Masumiyet/izle
Resmi Facebook Sayfası: https://www.facebook.com/masumiyetfox/

#Masumiyet #FOX #FOXplay

snippet.title: Đorđević: Vučićev obračun sa Stefanovićem ne može proći bezbolno
snippet.description:
Aleksandar Đorđević iz BIRN izjavio je u Danu uživo da "poslednjih dana svedočimo tome da se pravi pritisak na Nebojšu Stefanovića". "Sve je više jasno da je on prava meta svih ovih tabloidnih proganjanja i politička meta Vučića. Nama ostaje glavno pitanje zašto je Nebojša Stefanović baš sada i u ovom trenutku stavljen na odstrel i zašto se u stvari zamerio Vučiću. Svi u režimu su svesni da bi takav potez bio početak kraja ovog režima, obračunavanje sa Stefanovićem ne može da prođe bezbolno u ovom trenutku", kaže.

snippet.title: Emanet 130. Bölüm | Legacy Episode 130
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#hiçsin
#SehYam

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Sen Çal Kapımı 35. Bölüm 1. Fragmanı
snippet.description:
Sen Çal Kapımı 35. Bölüm 1. Fragmanı

Hayatta bütün umutlarını eğitimine bağlayan Eda, yurtdışı eğitim bursunu keserek lise mezunu kalmasına neden olan Serkan Bolat’la karşı karşıya gelir. Serkan Bolat, kendisiyle iki ay nişanlı taklidi yaparsa Eda’ya bursunu geri vermeyi teklif eder. Eda nefret ettiği bu adamın teklifini önce reddetse de koşullar değişince kabul etmek zorunda kalır. Nişanlı taklidi yaparken, Serkan ve Eda , bütün doğru bildiklerini unutturacak, tutkulu, zorlu bir ilişki yaşamaya başlarlar. Çünkü aşk zordur. Ve bu yüzden muhteşemdir.

snippet.title: Watch NASA’s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Masumiyet 3. Bölüm 2. Fragmanı | Ela'nın Haykırışları!
snippet.description:
Masumiyet 3. Bölüm 2. Fragmanı

Masumiyet Her Çarşamba 20.00'de FOX'ta!

Evli ve iki çocuk annesi Bahar’ın (Deniz Çakır) hayatı, 19 yaşındaki kızının yanlış bir adama aşık olmasıyla değişir. Kızı Ela’nın (İlayda Alişan) ilk aşkı, yaşıtı bir üniversite öğrencisi değil babasının, başkasıyla evlenmek üzere olan 35 yaşındaki patronudur. Kızını bu yanlış ilişkiden kurtarmaya çalışan Bahar, ne yapsa da olacakların önüne geçemez. Bahar ve ailesinin hayatı, Ela’nın 19. yaş gününde sonsuza kadar değişir.

OYUNCULAR: HÜLYA AVŞAR, MEHMET ASLANTUĞ, DENİZ ÇAKIR, İLAYDA ALİŞAN, SERKAY TÜTÜNCÜ, DENİZ IŞIN, SELEN UÇER, TOLGA GÜLEÇ, NESLİHAN ARSLAN, ASENA TUĞAL, ERTUĞRUL POSTOĞLU, ALAYÇA ÖZTÜRK GİDİŞLİ, KİMYA GÖKÇE AYTAÇ, GİZEM ERGÜN, ASENA KESKİNCİ, OZAN KAYA OKTU, SEVGİ TEMEL, RÜÇHAN ÇALIŞKUR

FOX Resmi Web Sitesi: https://www.fox.com.tr
Masumiyet: https://www.fox.com.tr/Masumiyet/izle
Resmi Facebook Sayfası: https://www.facebook.com/masumiyetfox/

#Masumiyet #FOX #FOXplay

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) – our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX’s site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. snippet.title: KONAČNI OBRAČUN SA REPTILIMA: Mi smo deo velikog sukoba, štiti nas moćna galaktička federacija!
snippet.description:
Gost na YouTube kanalu "Nauka i Misterije Balkan" bio je Aleksandar Hengl, osnivač društva prijatelja "Povratak Izvoru". On je medijum, astralni putnik i komunikacioni kanal za vanzemaljske civilizacije galaktičke federacije, u misiji za podizanje svesti usnulog čovečanstva i njegovu integraciju u galaktičke tokove i Univerzumske Unifikacije. Kao osnivač duhovnog centra “Povratak Izvoru” u Novom Sadu, organizuje edukativne skupove "Susret nauke i duhovnosti". Takođe je i saradnik serijala emisija “Kosmos”. Preporučujemo Vam da pogledate celu emisiju i saznate više o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar Pavković.

*************************************************************

Zabranjeno je svako preuzimanje snimaka i objavljivanje na drugim YouTube kanalima. Svi duplikati će biti uklanjani u skladu sa YouTube pravilima. Iz ovoga će biti izuzeti samo oni koji dobiju specijalnu dozvolu od vlasnika autorskih prava.

Autorska prava: "BALKAN INFO - Zvanični kanal"
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLG5Qu54Q7gywaCeDs5etuQ

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i žele da pomognu rad naše produkcije to mogu učiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudićemo se da ostanemo dosledni našoj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i širenju istine bez cenzure.

PAYPAL - Donacije za našu produkciju
https://www.paypal.me/tvbalkaninfo/

PATREON - Donacije za našu produkciju
https://www.patreon.com/tvbalkaninfo/

BALKAN INFO - Druge mogućnosti za donacije
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/donacije/

*************************************************************

Rad naše produkcije možete podržati kupovinom majica, dukserica, šolja i drugih proizvoda koji uz moderan i elegantan dizajn promovišu vrednosti za koje se svi zajedno borimo.

BALKAN INFO - Zvanična online prodavnica
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/prodavnica/

TEESPRING - Online prodavnica (samo za inostranstvo)
https://teespring.com/stores/tvbalkaninfo/

*************************************************************

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne žele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poštuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji čuvaju sećanje na naše slavne pretke.

BALKAN INFO - Nezavisna medijska produkcija
https://www.youtube.com/tvbalkaninfo/

DOKUMENTARNE EMISIJE BALKAN - Kratki snimci
https://www.youtube.com/dokumentarcibalkan/

NAUKA I MISTERIJE BALKAN - Naš drugi kanal
https://www.youtube.com/naukaimisterijebalkan/

OLUJA PROMENA - Naš treći kanal
https://www.youtube.com/olujapromena/

*************************************************************

Naš rad možete pratiti i na drugim društvenim mrežama:

BALKAN INFO - Facebook
https://www.facebook.com/tvbalkaninfo

BALKAN INFO - Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/tvbalkaninfo/

BALKAN INFO - Twitter
https://twitter.com/tvbalkaninfo

*************************************************************

https://www.paypal.me/tvbalkaninfo/

PATREON - Donacije za našu produkciju
https://www.patreon.com/tvbalkaninfo/

BALKAN INFO - Druge mogućnosti za donacije
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/donacije/

*************************************************************

Rad naše produkcije možete podržati kupovinom majica, dukserica, šolja i drugih proizvoda koji uz moderan i elegantan dizajn promovišu vrednosti za koje se svi zajedno borimo.

BALKAN INFO - Zvanična online prodavnica
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/prodavnica/

TEESPRING - Online prodavnica (samo za inostranstvo)
https://teespring.com/stores/tvbalkaninfo/

*************************************************************

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne žele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poštuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji čuvaju sećanje na naše slavne pretke.

BALKAN INFO - Nezavisna medijska produkcija
https://www.youtube.com/tvbalkaninfo/

DOKUMENTARNE EMISIJE BALKAN - Kratki snimci
https://www.youtube.com/dokumentarcibalkan/

NAUKA I MISTERIJE BALKAN - Naš drugi kanal
https://www.youtube.com/naukaimisterijebalkan/

OLUJA PROMENA - Naš treći kanal
https://www.youtube.com/olujapromena/

*************************************************************

Naš rad možete pratiti i na drugim društvenim mrežama:

BALKAN INFO - Facebook
https://www.facebook.com/tvbalkaninfo

BALKAN INFO - Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/tvbalkaninfo/

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASA’s Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? Join mission experts for update about the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – including imagery it captured and its mission to explore Mars.

snippet.title: Game Recap: Nuggets 128, Bucks 97
snippet.description: Nikola Jokic recorded the 50th triple-double of his career as he tallied 37 points, 10 rebounds and 11 assists for the Nuggets as they defeated the Bucks, 128-97. Giannis Antetokounmpo recorded 27 points, eight rebounds and three assists for the Bucks in the losing effort. The Nuggets improve to 20-15 on the season, while the Bucks fall to 21-14.

snippet.title: The Nuggets might need to give up Jamal Murray to keep Nikola Jokic happy - Paul Pierce | The Jump
snippet.description:
Paul Pierce and Richard Jefferson join Rachel Nichols on The Jump to play "Panic or Patience?" for the Miami Heat, Toronto Raptors and the Denver Nuggets. 
0:00 Panic or Patience? for the Miami Heat
2:05 Jefferson says the Toronto Raptors need to give up assets moving forward.
4:32 Pierce says the Denver Nuggets should panic.
4:53 Pierce believes the Nuggets might need to give up Jamal Murray to get back into the top 4 in the Western conference and keep Nikola Jokic happy.

snippet.title: Yemin 316. Bölüm | The Promise Season 3 Episode 316
snippet.description:
Yemin 316. Bölüm Özeti:

Yiğit için konakta kalmayı kabul etse de Feride henüz Emir’i affedebilmiş değildir. Yaşadıklarını bir türlü unutamayan Feride Emir’e karşı çok ağır konuşur. Feride ile Emir bu çıkmazın içinde daha ne kadar kalacaklar. Öte yandan Cavidan, Talaz’ın takibi sırasında kaza geçirir. Cavidan ölüm ile burun buruna gelmiştir. Düğün arifesinde hiçbir aksilik çıkmamıştır ve iki aşık sonunda muratlarına ererler. Bundan sonra onları Narin ile Kemal’i mutlu günler beklemektedir.

Abone olun / Subscribe / Suscríbete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise
